name: Chocolate Cake for Chocolate Lovers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325 degrees. In a large bowl, beat butter and add the sugar, a little at a time, beating well after each addition. Add eggs, vanilla, and chocolate syrup and beat until mixture is smooth and creamy. Add baking powder to the flour and fold into chocolate mixture. Grease a cake pan generously, making sure that all crevasses are well greased. Pour in batter and bake for 50 minutes. Let cake cool for a few minutes before turning out on a serving plate.
Cake may be served plain, iced, or with ice cream.
